## Added
- Two larger box shapes — **5×5×5** and **9×9×3** — in the `[` / `]` cycle, gated behind a new **Enable extra shapes** toggle (off by default).

## Changed
- Replaced Cloth Config with a built-in config screen; Veinminer++ no longer depends on Cloth Config. Existing config files carry over unchanged.
- Box shapes now break their **full volume** (no longer truncated by the block cap) and orient by the **face you're aiming at**, so the edge guide and the mined region match at any view angle.
- Lowered the default durability cost to **65%** of vanilla (was 80%). Existing configs keep their value.

## Fixed
- The see-through shape guide now renders with **Sodium** and **Iris** — it was invisible in those setups. With Iris installed the guide also shows under shaders, via Iris's lines program; there is no hard dependency on Iris.
- The keybind category now shows "Veinminer++" instead of its raw translation key.
